title: Best Berlin Döner Spots - Quick Summary
items: Berlin has over 1,000 döner kebab shops — the five listed here consistently stand out for quality, flavor, and experience.
**Top picks:** Dunya Gemüse Kebab (Friedrichshain), Golt'z Kebap (Charlottenburg), Oggi's (near Hauptbahnhof), Rüyam (Schöneberg), and Muca Kebap (Kreuzberg).
Expect to pay around **€7** per döner at all five spots. Look for Yaprak-style meat and house-baked bread as signs of quality.
Berlin's signature style is the **Gemüsekebab** — döner with grilled or stir-fried vegetables, not just raw salad.
If you're near Hauptbahnhof, Oggi's is a 3-minute walk away — perfect for a first-day-in-Berlin döner.
